name: Copilot Studio Gateway
description: Tool gateway to Microsoft Copilot Studio agents (web search, email, calendar via Microsoft 365)

directConnectUrl.description: Copilot Studio Direct Connect API URL

clientId.description: Azure AD application (client) ID for device code auth

agentMode.description: Register Copilot Studio as an agent provider (direct passthrough mode)

directConnectUrl.label: Direct Connect URL
directConnectUrl.help: The Copilot Studio Direct Connect API endpoint URL

tenantId.label: Tenant ID
tenantId.help: Azure AD tenant ID for your organization

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.help: Azure AD app registration client ID configured for device code flow

agentMode.label: Agent Mode
agentMode.help: Enable direct passthrough mode — Copilot Studio handles conversations directly instead of being called as a tool
